gen_sword_001.name: Rusted Shortsword
gen_sword_001.description: A pitted, rusted blade. It's better than a sharp rock.

gen_staff_001.name: Gnarled Branch
gen_staff_001.description: A thick, gnarled branch picked up from the forest floor. It hums faintly.

gen_wand_001.name: Apprentice Wand
gen_wand_001.description: A simple wooden wand carved with basic runes.

gen_dagger_001.name: Iron Shiv
gen_dagger_001.description: A crude iron blade, sharp enough to cut a purse or a throat.

gen_dagger_002.name: Chirurgeon's Scalpel
gen_dagger_002.description: A delicate, razor-sharp blade meant for flesh, not armor.

gen_bow_001.name: Hunter's Bow
gen_bow_001.description: A simple wooden bow used for hunting small game.

gen_mace_001.name: Acolyte's Mace
gen_mace_001.description: A sturdy mace, balanced for both combat and ceremony.

gen_mace_002.name: Iron Pestle
gen_mace_002.description: A heavy iron tool used for grinding herbs—and bones.

gen_wand_005.name: Crystal Focus
gen_wand_005.description: A polished quartz crystal set in a silver handle.

gen_armor_001.name: Tattered Tunic
gen_armor_001.description: Moth-eaten and stained, but it's another layer between you and the world.

gen_mediumarmor_002.name: Apothecary's Leathers
gen_mediumarmor_002.description: Sturdy leather stained with various chemical reagents.

gen_rogue_armor_001.name: Worn Leather Vest
gen_rogue_armor_001.description: Supple leather, worn thin by use, but allows freedom of movement.

gen_accessory_001.name: Twine Bracelet
gen_accessory_001.description: A simple loop of twine. Smells faintly of moss.

gen_accessory_002.name: Bandolier of Vials
gen_accessory_002.description: A leather strap holding several empty glass vials.

gen_dagger_003.name: Iron Dirk
gen_dagger_003.description: A standard-issue iron dagger. Dependable and sharp.

gen_robe_003.name: Acolyte's Robe
gen_robe_003.description: A heavy wool robe dyed deep indigo.

gen_accessory_003c.name: Polished Stone
gen_accessory_003c.description: A smooth river stone warm to the touch.

gen_sword_005.name: Hunter's Falchion
gen_sword_005.description: A curved heavy blade designed for hide and bone.

gen_staff_005.name: Aether-Channeling Staff
gen_staff_005.description: A willow staff capped with raw magic stone.

gen_accessory_005c.name: Signet of the Old Guild
gen_accessory_005c.description: A silver ring bearing an ancient guild crest.

gen_sword_007.name: Kingslayer Claymore
gen_sword_007.description: A massive blade rumored to end dynasties.

gen_dagger_006.name: Nightshade Stiletto
gen_dagger_006.description: Coated in a poison feared by nobles.

gen_staff_007.name: Eldertree Soulbranch
gen_staff_007.description: Carved from the roots of a mythical eldertree.

gen_accessory_007.name: Charm of Windsong
gen_accessory_007.description: Sings softly when fortune favors you.

gen_heavyarmor_006c.name: Colossusplate Shell
gen_heavyarmor_006c.description: Made from the remains of a colossal titan.

gen_accessory_008.name: Emblem of Infinite Fortune
gen_accessory_008.description: Whispers with the winds of destiny.

gen_sword_009.name: Eclipsebreaker
gen_sword_009.description: Forged in the heart of a dying star.

gen_staff_009.name: Staff of the Worldheart
gen_staff_009.description: Contains a spark from creation itself.

gen_heavyarmor_007.name: World-Titan Carapace
gen_heavyarmor_007.description: Forged from the armor of an elder titan.

gen_accessory_009.name: Mythic Soul Sigil
gen_accessory_009.description: Hums with the echo of a forgotten god.

gen_sword_molten.name: Molten Greatsword
gen_sword_molten.description: A heavy blade that glows with the heat of the caldera.

gen_dagger_molten.name: Obsidian Dagger
gen_dagger_molten.description: A jagged dagger carved from volcanic glass. Exceptionally sharp.

gen_robe_molten.name: Magma-Infused Robes
gen_robe_molten.description: Robes woven with fire essence, warm to the touch.

gen_heavyarmor_molten.name: Drake Scale Mail
gen_heavyarmor_molten.description: Armor crafted from the heat-resistant scales of a Lava Drake.

gen_accessory_molten.name: Heart of the Volcano
gen_accessory_molten.description: A pulsating magma core set in gold. It beats in time with your heart.

gen_bow_clockwork.name: Clockwork Repeating Crossbow
gen_bow_clockwork.description: A mechanical crossbow with a self-loading mechanism.

gen_mace_clockwork.name: Piston-Driven Greatmaul
gen_mace_clockwork.description: A massive hammer powered by a steam piston.

gen_heavyarmor_clockwork.name: Reinforced Brass Plate
gen_heavyarmor_clockwork.description: Heavy brass plating riveted over steel.

gen_accessory_clockwork.name: Artificer's Lenses
gen_accessory_clockwork.description: Goggles that reveal the flow of magic and mechanism.

acc_warrior_ring.name: Ring of Iron Will
acc_warrior_ring.description: A heavy iron band inscribed with the code of the shield-bearer.

acc_mage_ring.name: Ring of Arcane Focus
acc_mage_ring.description: A delicate silver ring that hums when near ley lines.
